raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The causal attribution claim ('structural marker — and not the additional tokens — is responsible') and the assertion 'clearly outperforms' from sub-2-point margins both require logical consistency scrutiny; the ablation logic is asserted, not demonstrated.","R1.3":"All three reported baselines are variants of the authors' own prior method (FreeForm-CoT); the artifact claims to advance 'state of the art in chain-style prompting' without comparing against any independent external baselines, making evidence-claim alignment a central review target.","R1.4":"The novelty delta is materially ambiguous: numbered step markers have broad prior art in CoT literature; the comparison set is entirely self-authored, making it impossible to assess the true contribution delta from the reported experiments alone.","R1.7":"Every baseline cites 'Anonymous, 2023a' (self-reference); no external chain-of-thought, least-to-most, or scratchpad prompting work is cited despite the positioning claim, indicating a significant coverage gap."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should 'check this' be interpreted as (a) verifying that the reported numerical results actually support the evidentiary claims made in the text, or (b) assessing novelty and scholarly positioning relative to the broader chain-of-thought prompting literature outside the authors' own prior work?"}

rationale.R1.2: The causal attribution claim ('structural marker — and not the additional tokens — is responsible') and the assertion 'clearly outperforms' from sub-2-point margins both require logical consistency scrutiny; the ablation logic is asserted, not demonstrated.
rationale.R1.3: All three reported baselines are variants of the authors' own prior method (FreeForm-CoT); the artifact claims to advance 'state of the art in chain-style prompting' without comparing against any independent external baselines, making evidence-claim alignment a central review target.
rationale.R1.4: The novelty delta is materially ambiguous: numbered step markers have broad prior art in CoT literature; the comparison set is entirely self-authored, making it impossible to assess the true contribution delta from the reported experiments alone.
rationale.R1.7: Every baseline cites 'Anonymous, 2023a' (self-reference); no external chain-of-thought, least-to-most, or scratchpad prompting work is cited despite the positioning claim, indicating a significant coverage gap.

parsed.clarification_question: Should 'check this' be interpreted as (a) verifying that the reported numerical results actually support the evidentiary claims made in the text, or (b) assessing novelty and scholarly positioning relative to the broader chain-of-thought prompting literature outside the authors' own prior work?
